title: centaurea cyanomorpha
intro: Centaurea cyanomorpha, also known as Centaurea cyanus or Cornflower, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Centaurea cyanomorpha include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
